children.heading: Participating county
children.label: 1 Participating county
children.text: The term “participating county” means an eligible county that elects under to expend a portion of the Federal funds received under in accordance with this subchapter.section 7112(d) of this titlesection 7112 of this title

children.heading: Project funds
children.label: 2 Project funds
children.text: The term “project funds” means all funds an eligible county elects under to reserve for expenditure in accordance with this subchapter.section 7112(d) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: an advisory committee established by the Secretary concerned under ; orsection 7125 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: an advisory committee determined by the Secretary concerned to meet the requirements of .section 7125 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a land use plan prepared by the Bureau of Land Management for units of the Federal land described in pursuant to ; orsection 7102(7)(B) of this titlesection 1712 of title 43

children.label: B
children.text: a land and resource management plan prepared by the Forest Service for units of the National Forest System pursuant to .section 1604 of this title
